calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-08-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two minors.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioner Norma Fierro present in pro per for the minor, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Monzerrad Farrah Farr Fierro.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to: Ezmeralda Farrah Farr Fierro.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-28-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Dave Davenport.
There being no appearances, this matter is ordered off calendar.
